item.title: F-036b: iPad Split View, Slide Over, and External Display
item.intent: Content must reflow gracefully at every width — from narrow Slide Over to full external display
item.description: Depends on: FEAT-037 (App Shell), FEAT-010 (Typography). Split View at 1/3, 1/2, 2/3 widths with graceful content reflow. Slide Over for quick edits. External display: editor spans full display with content width constraints (70-80 char max per D-PERF typography). No letterboxing. Resolution independent (sharp on non-Retina external displays). Content width adapts in real time during Split View resize.
acceptanceCriteria: Content reflows without jumpiness during Split View resize drag
Slide Over at narrowest width shows content without horizontal scrolling
External display shows sharp text with appropriate content width constraints
No letterboxing or awkward black bars on any display size
